profile.name: Qincheng Qiao
profile.title: Ph.D. Candidate · Clinical Medicine
profile.bio: I focus on research in corneal nerve image processing and analysis.

about.title: About Me
paragraphs: I am a Ph.D. candidate at the First Clinical Medical College, Shandong University, advised by Prof. Xinguo Hou.
My research focuses on developing models and algorithms for processing and analyzing corneal nerve images.
